generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis for steering and speed control via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis hosting autonomy components including NVIDIA Jetson NX and Jetson Orin Nano microcomputers"
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for real-time ACC computation and data processing, executing speed control commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection in the autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for 3D environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance EgoVehicleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors capturing ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and detected objects in proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction - Data Transmitted
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSensor
]

instance DetectedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance LiDARPointCloudModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization of LiDAR point clouds for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationFE
]

instance ObjectTrackDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing detected object tracks with position and velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DetectedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingService
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time aggregated data for 3D visualization of driving path and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, DetectedObjectTracks, EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationFE
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for intra-vehicle communication and package deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionFE, DataPreProcessingFE, DataVisualizationFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for programming Jetson Orin Nano microcomputers"
    DTDFVocab:enables JetsonOrinNanoActuator
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "Data Collection Feature Engine for real-time aggregation of ego vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing Feature Engine applying DBSCAN/Kalman filtering for object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, DataVisualizationFE
]

instance DataVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Feature Engine for real-time rendering of object tracks and driving paths"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Feature Engine ensuring inter-entity compatibility for data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables CloudOffloadingService
]

instance WiFiNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi network for inter-entity communication between physical and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ClockSynchronization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization to 100 ms accuracy for event ordering and data integrity"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, CloudOffloadingService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service visualizing ego vehicle state, detected object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance CloudOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading service that reduces resource constraints on Jetson Orin Nano by processing ACC computations in cloud/DT environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationEfficiencyInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management service enabling operators to adjust ACC parameters (desired speed) or trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical reporting service generating time-series reports from stored object tracks and ego vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:provides TroubleshootingReport
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ACC system efficiency including speed adjustments and object tracking accuracy"
]

instance ComputationEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance insights on ACC system resource utilization and computational efficiency"
]

instance TroubleshootingReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical reports for developers to diagnose design flaws or hardware issues based on stored data"
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC parameters (desired speed) or triggering emergency braking without physical intervention"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic emergency braking triggered by system safety protocols"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LowerLevelChassis, UpperLevelChassis, HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, EgoVehicleSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains JetsonOrinNanoActuator, DataCollectionFE, DataPreProcessingFE,
                 DataVisualizationFE, DataTranslationFE, ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetpackSDK
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin interacts with the physical twin via **ROS2 network** for intra-vehicle commands and **Wi-Fi** for remote management. Key outputs include:
  - **Desired speed commands** (sent via **Actuation FE** to the speed controller).
  - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) via **Control Panel User Interface FE**.
  The system adheres to **ISO 15622** for ACC control logic (performance class I), with actuation executed on the physical speed controller. End-to-end latency is constrained to **≤100 ms** for real-time safety-critical operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning operates at **real-time granularity** with a **twinning cycle frequency of ~100 ms** (aligned with 3GPP V2V communication requirements). Critical synchronization (e.g., clock accuracy) is maintained at **100 ms precision** to ensure deterministic event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensors (LiDAR, camera), actuators (speed controller), and **Data Pre-Processing FE** (DBSCAN/Kalman filtering).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages **Data Collection FE**, **Reporting FE**, **ACC Controlling FE**, and **Data Storage** (SQL database).
  - **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization FE** and **Control Panel FE** for remote management.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity data alignment (ROS2/Wi-Fi communication). The architecture follows ISO 23247 entity-based structure but introduces the **Physical Twin Entity** as a domain-specific extension."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across two primary lifecycle stages:
  1) **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC system development, validation against ISO 15622 standards, and troubleshooting via data-driven insights.
  2) **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance during vehicle operation. The system does not explicitly cover a **Manufacturing Phase** (e.g., remote testing during production), as it focuses on retrofitted autonomous vehicle testing."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through:
  - **Real-time data streams** (LiDAR, ego state) with minimal latency (<100 ms).
  - **Verification**: ISO 15622 compliance for ACC control logic (performance class I).
  - **Validation**: Case-based generalization from real automotive projects (e.g., fuel economy optimization via DTs). Uncertainty is managed via sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera) and deterministic clock synchronization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs:
  - **Intra-vehicle Communication**: ROS2 network (ROS2-based ROS packages) for low-latency data exchange between sensors/actuators.
  - **Inter-entity Communication**: Wi-Fi network (UDP-based) for DT-to-PT interactions, ensuring **≤100 ms end-to-end latency**.
  - **Network Protocols**: ROS2 (for intra-vehicle) and Wi-Fi (for remote management). Clock synchronization is achieved via hardware-level precision (±100 ms)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed on:
  - **Onboard Hardware**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (for real-time processing) and Jetson NX (for sensor fusion).
  - **External Storage**: SQL databases (for data storage) hosted externally to the vehicle (e.g., cloud/edge servers).
  - **Remote Management**: Accessible via Wi-Fi-enabled UI (3D Visualization + Control Panel) for operators/developers."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: Not explicitly detailed in the case study, but could include V2V/V2I communication frameworks (e.g., 3GPP standards) for broader autonomous vehicle ecosystems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture (entity-based structure) adapted for automotive DTs, with **Physical Twin Entity** added.
  - **ISO 15622**: ACC control logic (performance class I).
  - **3GPP 22.185**: V2V communication latency requirements (<100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Middleware for inter-entity communication and deployment."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed via:
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency to prevent catastrophic failures (e.g., delayed braking).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for deterministic event ordering.
  - **Remote Management**: Emergency braking commands are critical; no explicit mention of cybersecurity (e.g., encryption) but assumes secure Wi-Fi/Wi-Fi-based communication.
  - **Safety Validation**: ISO 15622 compliance ensures ACC system reliability. The system is designed for **Human-in-the-Loop** operation (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin category)."
]
